perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of young people cheer and wave in a brightly lit studio setting while a white office chair is spun in the foreground. (2) In a fast-paced montage, different main characters take turns sitting on the chair as it finishes spinning, each posing with specific items including a red suitcase, skincare products, a neck pillow, and a gift bag. (3) The video concludes with a man wearing glasses sitting on the chair and lifting a red three-tiered trolley above his head while the background group continues to celebrate with confetti.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately with loud, synchronized group cheering and shouting. (2) Every few seconds, a distinct 'whoosh' sound effect occurs, synchronized with the spinning of the chair on screen. (3) The high-tempo music and enthusiastic vocal cheering continue consistently until the end of the clip, maintaining a festive atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '11.08 - 11.11 哈比狂歡購' - Hook text indicating the sale event dates and title. (2) '天天抽好禮' - Hook text regarding daily gift draws. (3) '優惠沒得比' - Hook text emphasizing price discounts. (4) '免運不打烊' - Hook text about 24/7 free shipping. (5) '還有滿額禮' - Hook text regarding gifts for specific spending thresholds. (6) '就在hahababy' - Functional text identifying the brand and platform.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 6 main characters appear sequentially on the chair, while approximately 3 background performers cheer throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Various young adults dressed in casual, trendy attire including striped shirts, plaid patterns, and colorful t-shirts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor studio with light beige walls, a wooden floor, and a large green potted plant in the corner.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> List-based Product Display -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate excitement and urgency for a limited-time shopping carnival (11.08-11.11). By using a high-energy group atmosphere and a fast-paced 'spinning chair' reveal format, the video highlights multiple incentives like free shipping and gifts to drive consumers to the hahababy brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products and brand name 'hahababy' with specific sale dates and benefits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-spinning chair transitions and high-energy group cheers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the '11.11' shopping festival context common in East Asian e-commerce marketing.
